ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "moa" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the drug */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Structural formula or SMILES notation of the drug */,
  "targets" TEXT /* Targets or biomarkers associated with the drug's mechanism of action */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Known side effects of the drug */,
  "indication" TEXT /* Approved indication or therapeutic area for the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of regulatory approval for the drug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the drug in the development pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efficacy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficacy metric record */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug being analyzed */,
  "multiomics_score" REAL /* Score derived from multi-omics data */,
  "panel_score" REAL /* Score from clinical panel data */,
  "improvement_score" REAL /* Calculated improvement score */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis or update to the efficacy metrics */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the multi-omics dataset used to derive the efficacy scores */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the algorithm or model used to calculate the efficacy scores */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the efficacy scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficacy_metrics_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficacy_metrics_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficacy_metrics_dataset FOREIGN KEY ("dataset") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical panel */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug associated with the panel */,
  "panel_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical panel */,
  "panel_type" TEXT /* Type of clinical panel */,
  "panel_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the clinical panel */,
  "panel_status" TEXT /* Status of the clinical panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_panels_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "contributions" TEXT /* Brief description of the researcher's contributions to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_targets" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug being analyzed */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the target or biomarker */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target or biomarker */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the target or biomarker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id", "target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the target or biomarker */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target or biomarker */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the target or biomarker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the multi-omics dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the multi-omics dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the multi-omics dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the algorithm or model */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm or model */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm or model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)
